payload.answer: The new fact supersedes the existing current employment. Record Sam as currently at Point72 and demote Goldman from current to former employer status.
citations: Existing current fact: Sam works at Goldman.
New fact: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.

entity_resolution.reason: The new fact refers to the same person and updates the employer relationship rather than introducing a new Sam.

details: Detected direct contradiction on current employer.
Resolved by treating the new statement as a temporal employment transition.
Avoided preserving the superseded Goldman employment as current.

repair_options: Replace the current employer fact 'Sam works at Goldman' with 'Sam works at Point72'.
Retain Goldman only as past employment, not as a current fact.
If supported, add an employment transition event or effective date when available.
